commit_message: Slave ipbus_ctrs_ported : Add missing 'READ_ONLY' generic Slave ipbus_ctrs_ported : Add missing 'READ_ONLY' generic This pull request fixes a bug from PR #65 - omission of `READ_ONLY` generic from declaration of the `ipbus_ctrs_ported` entity. Part of issue #64
